Prompt
U
Oracle Events
- Search emails for Cascade Financial correspondence using search_emails (query: "Cascade" or "Lydia" or similar). Discover the email chain: Lydia Matsumura's initial request to Mina, Mina's reply, Lydia's follow-up with employee details, Mina's internal handoff to Chloe, and Chloe's assignment briefing to Javier (UNREAD).
- Read Chloe's briefing email to get full requirements for all 3 employees: Elena Park (200-lb server rack, toddler), James Okafor (75-gallon aquarium, 5-day lease gap), Aisha Fernandez (chain-of-custody filing cabinet, golden retriever). Note action items including emailing Lydia, sourcing apartments, checking Swift for aquarium experience, creating Linear tickets, and attending the kickoff call on Wednesday April 9 at 10 AM PT.
- Read Lydia's details email to get employee addresses, contact info, equipment specs, apartment preferences, and the note about Aisha's IT security certification requirement.
- Search Slack using conversations_search_messages (query: "Cascade" or "Portland" or similar). Find Mina's announcement in #customer-engagement about the new client ($13,850 estimate, 8-10 more moves possible) and Chloe's assignment post in #operations listing all 3 relocations with complications and requesting Javier's initial assessment by end of week.
- Search Airtable using airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records (table: "Relocations", filter: "Cascade" or "Javier" or similar). Find 3 records: Elena Park (Seattle to Portland, April 21-23), James Okafor (Chicago to Portland, April 24-26), Aisha Fernandez (Miami to Portland, April 28-30). Read Special Requirements fields for complication details.
- Search Airtable or emails for past relocations involving similar complications using airtable_search_records or search_emails (query: "server rack" or "chain-of-custody" or "aquarium" or "heavy equipment" or similar). Find references to past specialty equipment moves such as Diego Castañeda's CNC mill, Keiko Tanaka's laser cutter, Raj Patel's server lab chain-of-custody, or Priya Venkatesh's lab equipment to establish precedent and reference points.
- Search CRM using crm_search_companies (query: "Cascade" or similar). Find the company record: fintech, 280 employees, Portland HQ, first external relocation client.
- Search CRM deals using crm_search_deals (query: "Cascade" or similar). Find the onboarding deal: $13,850, stage "contract_sent", pending Lydia's approval.
- Search CRM engagements using crm_list_engagements for Cascade Financial. Find the onboarding note with full account context, employee details, financial breakdown, and the note that CTO Chris Nakamura recommended MoveOps via Derek Hollis at GreenStack.
- Search Linear using linear_list_issues (query: "Cascade" or "Elena Park" or similar). Find 1 existing ticket: Apartment Search for Elena Park (#350, To Do, assigned to Javier). James Okafor and Aisha Fernandez have no Linear tickets.
- Search QuickBooks using quickbooks_search_invoices (query: "Cascade" or similar). Find estimate EST-2026-0420 for $13,850 total. Surcharges: server rack transport $850, aquarium handling $1,200, temp storage $240, chain-of-custody transport $1,000 - all pending client approval.
- Search calendar using calendar_search_events (query: "Cascade" or "Lydia" or similar). Find the existing kickoff call on Wednesday April 9 at 10 AM PT on Zoom with Javier, Lydia, and Mina.
- Look up contacts using contacts_search_contacts (queries: "Lydia", "Mina", "Carmen", "Greg", "Elena Park", "James Okafor", "Aisha Fernandez" or similar). Find Lydia (lydia.matsumura@cascadefinancial.com), Carmen Reyes (carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com), Greg Pallone (greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com), Elena (elena.park@cascadefinancial.com), James (james.okafor@cascadefinancial.com). Aisha Fernandez is NOT in the contacts database.
- Send email using send_email from javier.morales@moveops.com to lydia.matsumura@cascadefinancial.com introducing himself as coordinator and asking about outstanding items such as the IT security certification checklist for Aisha or chain-of-custody logistics.
- Send email using send_email from javier.morales@moveops.com to carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com requesting apartment options in Portland for all 3 Cascade Financial employees: Elena Park (Pearl District or Alberta Arts, 2BR, childproof-ready, up to $3,200/month), James Okafor (Hawthorne or Division, 1BR with office, up to $2,400/month), Aisha Fernandez (NW Portland or Slabtown, 1BR, pet-friendly with yard, up to $2,600/month).
- Send email using send_email from javier.morales@moveops.com to greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com asking about specialty transport capability for the Cascade moves: whether Swift can handle a 200-lb server rack requiring upright vibration-dampened transport, a 75-gallon glass aquarium, and a 350-lb fireproof filing cabinet requiring chain-of-custody protocol with GPS tracking and no warehouse stops.
- Create Linear tickets using linear_create_issue for James Okafor and Aisha Fernandez relocations in the Cascade Financial project. Elena Park already has a ticket.
- Update Airtable records using airtable_update_records with current status notes for the Cascade relocations.
- Create calendar event using calendar_add_calendar_event for a planning sync with Mina Hashimoto early next week, separate from the existing Lydia kickoff.
- Post initial assessment in #operations (channel C006) using conversations_add_message covering all 3 relocations with timelines, complications, blockers, past precedent references, and the strategic context.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

Both outstanding item types from the criterion are present.
✓Run #3The email body introduces 'I'm Javier Morales, your dedicated relocation coordinator at MoveOps' and explicitly asks about the IT certification checklist ('Aisha will be working remotely until her home office passes your IT security cert. ✓Run #5The email to Lydia explicitly introduces Javier as 'your dedicated relocation coordinator at MoveOps' and asks specifically about the IT security certification checklist ('You mentioned sending an IT security certification checklist for Aisha's home office setup — I don't believe we've received that yet') and chain-of-custody sealing logistics ('Can you confirm when your compliance officer will be on-site in Miami for the sealing').
